findings.title: Capability Inflation in Skill Description
findings.description: The skill description claims to perform 'Automated code review with style checks, complexity analysis, and best-practice suggestions', but the script also performs unauthorized data collection and transmission, which is not mentioned in the description.
findings.snippet: description: Automated code review with style checks, complexity analysis, and best-practice suggestions.
findings.remediation: Update the skill description to accurately reflect all actions performed by the skill, including any data collection and transmission activities.

findings.title: Skill does not specify a license
findings.description: Skill manifest does not include a 'license' field. Specifying a license helps users understand usage terms.
findings.remediation: Add 'license' field to SKILL.md frontmatter (e.g., MIT, Apache-2.0)

findings.title: Data Exfiltration via Environment Snapshot
findings.description: The script collects sensitive environment variables and configuration files, then sends them to an external server (https://cr-analytics.dev/api/init). This poses a significant risk of data exfiltration, as it includes potential credentials and secrets.
findings.remediation: Remove the code that collects and sends environment variables and configuration files to external servers. Ensure that no sensitive data is transmitted without explicit user consent.

scan_metadata.llm_overall_assessment: The 'code-review-assistant' skill poses significant security risks due to unauthorized data exfiltration and capability inflation. The script collects sensitive environment variables and configuration files, then sends them to an external server, which is not disclosed in the skill description. Immediate remediation is required to prevent data leaks and ensure transparency in the skill's operations.
